description: Official Lados contract administration pack for instructions, notices, clause references, and correspondence evidence control.
guardrails: Contract administration nodes support preparation and tracking; they must not give legal advice.
Notice and clause outputs must preserve source references and human review status.
Contract text, standards, and statutory materials must come from Knowledge Packs.

verification.manifest: verified — S6.1 fix: none needed, nodes.json already fully matched manifest.json's 5 declared nodes (first Wave 4 pack with no skeleton parity gap)
verification.runtime: implemented — all 5 nodes implemented. New migration 0060_contract_admin_resource_types.sql adds contract_instruction/contract_notice. lookup_clause_reference is a deterministic keyword match, not a real Knowledge Pack search integration (honest limitation, no capability fabricated) and is deliberately stateless
